rows.notes: Top-of-page running header. The first word is faded and the spelling is uncertain (appears as 'Arranagua' or similar). No amounts present; alignment with columns not needed.
Clear centered section heading 'Redeemed Land Tax'. No amounts on this heading; text legible and well-formed.
Description legible. Amount reads '22 5 6' aligned in the three rightmost columns (pounds/shillings/pence). All values within valid ranges.

Line begins with 'Do' (ditto) and 'Vicarage'. In the amount columns there are ditto marks/quotation marks instead of explicit numerals — interpreted as an entry without explicitly written amounts on this line.
Description clear. Amount reads '28 0 0' clearly in pounds/shillings/pence columns. Values validate (shillings 0–19, pence 0–11).
Repeated 'Do' for vicarage. As with earlier similar lines, only ditto marks appear in the amount area; no explicit numerals are present on this line.
Description legible. Amount reads '14 0 0' clearly in the three right-hand columns. Values within valid ranges.
Clear centered section heading 'Mixed Rents Variable'. No numeric amounts on the heading itself.
Amounts aligned in pounds/shillings/pence: '210 18 9'. Pounds are large but legible. Shillings 18 and pence 9 are within valid ranges. Slight ink faintness on hundreds digit warrants 0.80 confidence.
Reads '18 18 11' in the three monetary columns. The final pence digit is slightly crowded but consistent with column alignment; all values within valid ranges.
Amount appears as '115 2 3 1/2' (pence '3' with a half-penny symbol). Vertical alignment is consistent; half-penny symbol interpreted as 0.5.
Amount reads '39 0 10 3/4' — pence 10 with three-quarter-farthings symbol (interpreted as 0.75). Columns are well-aligned; fraction clear.
Reads '5 17 5 1/2' (pence 5 and half-penny). Column alignment clear; fraction sign (half-penny) present and interpreted as 0.5.
Description includes parenthetical note. Amount '240 2 5' is clearly written and aligns well with the three columns. Values validate.
Amount appears as '50 5 5 1/2' — pence 5 with half-penny. The 'Do.' indicates repetition of place; spelling and numbers are legible.
Amount '25 10 7' is clearly aligned. Description legible. All currency fields fall within valid ranges.
Amount reads '9 7 0 1/4' — zero pence with a farthing symbol (0.25). The tiny farthing mark is somewhat faint; column alignment supports this reading.
Amount '30 0 9 1/2' (pence 9 and half-penny). The half-penny loop is visible; columns are properly aligned.
Reads '9 10 3 1/2' — pence 3 with half-penny. Description spelling 'Blinkard' is legible; amounts align with ruling lines.
Amount '47 5 2' clear in the three monetary columns. 'Do' indicates same place as previous line; description and numbers are readable.
Place name spelled from handwriting as 'Tintinhulle' (some uncertainty on exact spelling). Amount appears as '17 0 0 1/2' (pence 0 and half-penny). Column alignment strong for amounts.
Small amount '2 16 1' is clearly written and aligned. 'Do' indicates place repeated; numbers unambiguous.

Place name uncertain in spelling (appears as 'Trethewin'/'Trethewins'); I chose 'Trethewin'. Amount reads '37 10 4 1/2' (pence 4 and half-penny). Description uncertainty reduces confidence slightly; numeric columns are clear.

Place appears as 'Little Lew' (spelling uncertain but closely matches the handwriting). Amount '16 9 8' visible and aligns with the columns; small uncertainty on place name yields slightly reduced confidence.

Second sub-line under the previous heading — name is faint and ambiguous (read as 'Worsley'/'Wardley'). Amount reads '20 17 5 3/4' (pence 5 with three-quarters). Fraction mark is small and slightly smudged, lowering confidence on transcription of the name.
Name appears as 'Rinder' (could be alternate spelling). Amount '19 4 8 1/2' visible: pence 8 with half-penny. Name faint; amounts clearer than the description.
Description 'Eden' clearly read. Amount '7 7 8' legible and aligned; all numerical fields valid.
Surname reads as 'Simons' (could be 'Simmons'); amount '6 19 3' clear. Shillings 19 within allowed range; pence 3 valid.
Final line shows '1 19 2 3/4' — pence 2 with three-quarters (0.75). Place/name reads as 'Huxley' though initial letter is faint; numeric columns and fraction marking are visible.
